mapper.insert: insert into aiw_ai_prompt_evaluation (biz_id, prompt_biz_id, prompt_code, prompt_version, scenario, backtest_biz_id, feedback_biz_id, score, score_detail, review_status, evaluator_type, evaluator_biz_id, evaluated_at, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{promptBizId}, #{promptCode}, #{promptVersion}, #{scenario}, #{backtestBizId}, #{feedbackBizId}, #{score}, #{scoreDetail}, #{reviewStatus}, #{evaluatorType}, #{evaluatorBizId}, #{evaluatedAt}, #{createdAt})
